mnemonics: Props Pass Down Like a One-Way Street
keyPoints: Properties (props) are used to pass data from a parent component to a child component.
Props are read-only; a child component cannot modify the props it receives.
Data flows uni-directionally, from the top of the component tree down to the leaves.
commonMistakes: Attempting to mutate props directly in the child component, which will cause an error.
Forgetting to define props in the child component before trying to use them.
Creating complex, multi-level prop drilling instead of using a state management solution for global data.
